name: Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing Mix/Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the saltines through a blender on high speed until powdered.
2. Add parsley, minced onions, and dill weed to the blender. Blend again until powdered.
3. Dump the mixture into a bowl.
4. Stir in onion salt, garlic salt, onion powder, and garlic powder.
5. Transfer the mixture to a container with a tight-fitting lid.
6. Store at room temperature for up to 1 year.
7. To use the mix: Combine the powdered mix, mayo, and buttermilk. Yield: 1 pint.
